response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains, with strong evidence of architectural thinking, open-source contributions, and AI-agent work — all aligned with the role. However, the resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, React, or Kubernetes in professional contexts, and key required technologies like Kotlin/Java are only listed in skills without demonstrated enterprise use. The mismatch in contact details (name vs. URLs) also raises minor red flags.
strengths: Proven full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple enterprise roles
Strong AI-agent infrastructure exposure and open-source contributions in geospatial and tooling domains
Demonstrated architectural flexibility and cross-language proficiency (DLang, Java, Kotlin, Python)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in professional projects despite being required
Kotlin/Java experience listed in skills but not contextualized in enterprise backend services
Contact information (email, GitHub) uses name 'szabobogdan' inconsistent with resume name 'Aisha Okonkwo'
